FsmCommandc
Commandz
Toggle between disk lock and DLM used by shared pools, 
automatically set all the pools on this host by default.
CVM login username and password must be provided to 
deal with authentication.c
lockmodeZ
dlmZ
dlockz3lock type on pools to be set, supports dlm or dlock)
choices
helpz
--name
	pool_namez	pool-namez8specify a pool by name on this host and set a lock type.)
dest
metavarr

self
parser
%./fsm/cmdline/commands/setlocktype.py

Command.add_argumentsc
Builds the request)
header
bodyZ
POSTz
/pools/lock-modei

timeoutz

usernamez	Password:
passwordz)

Abortr
Has the pool %s been stopped on hosts [y/n]:r
[91m NOTICE
[0m: Suggest to set the lock type on pool one by one. Are you sure to continue [y/n]:z
User reply: %sz,
Have all pools been stooped on hosts [y/n]:z-Please wait a moment, it will take some time.)
